prompt: Build a local-first Personal Music Collection Catalog module in Python using SQLite that allows users to add, edit, delete, and search physical music items (CDs, vinyl, cassettes). Each item must include: artist, album title, format type, condition rating, purchase date, purchase price, vendor/source, and nested track listing. Include full-text search across all fields, filtering by format/artist/year/condition, CSV import/export, and a simple CLI or GUI for browsing the collection. The module should be self-contained with no cloud dependencies.

Build a bicycle spoke length calculator module that enables users to search and select from a database of rims and hubs, input custom dimensions, calculate the correct spoke length using the standard formula (square root of the sum of squared spoke bed radius and hub flange distance, minus cross number factor), save build configurations, and print/export results. Include support for different lacing patterns. The module should have searchable component databases with ERD-native records for rim and hub specifications, a calculation engine, and a wheel build form.

Create a bounded module that allows the user to: 1) Choose a root folder (or entire volume). 2) Scan recursively and build a local index of all files with basic metadata (name, path, size, date). 3) Present a searchable list of these file records. 4) Allow the user to add custom keywords/tags to any record. 5) Build a keyword index so the user can filter by tag. 6) Provide a way to open a file from its record using the system default handler. Scope: local-first, single-user.

Write a bounded module specification for PhoneFormat Migrator: a single-purpose phone number format migration tool that takes legacy phone number data from contacts, converts them to a target format (E.164, national, or international), validates results, and exports corrected records. Include clear input schema, transformation rules, validation logic, and output format.
user wants to add card to collection, browse collection, search cards, filter by player/team/year, edit card details, export collection to CSV

Implement a searchable music repertoire catalog module supporting work lookups by RV number, title, key, and instrumentation. Include structured records with detail views, demo data gating, and optional media attachments. The module should serve a sovereign local-first experience for researchers, musicians, and music enthusiasts.

user provides: (1) the source dataset or table name, (2) one or more filter criteria (field conditions), (3) optional desired output format. Module produces: a saved subset (table/view/file) containing only records matching the criteria, ready for reporting or review.
Utility library for application scripting with menu helpers, file picker, context lookup, and error handling
files to compress (or archive to extract), desired format, destination path, optional compression level
local music collection catalog, offline cd database, personal discography organizer

a user wants to catalog a personal collection of dolls, action figures, or similar collectibles with separate tracking for main items and related accessories, need to add item name, category, condition, acquisition date, notes, and photos

Create a bounded local-first module that lets users select a tarot/oracle spread pattern, input or draw cards for each position, and receive guided interpretations that account for card position and interrelations. Include optional text-to-speech for the interpretation. Allow basic export of readings for personal reflection records.

You need a bounded JavaScript module that does two things: (1) takes an array of strings or objects and sorts them by any property ascending/descending, (2) takes the same collection and a search term, returning the index/position where that text appears. Requirements: no external dependencies beyond vanilla JS, runs entirely in browser, maintains original collection integrity, provides position data for found items. Return as ES6 module with sort() and find() functions.

A minimal local-first alarm module that schedules and plays audio at a set wake-up time. Users can select the alarm time, choose an audio file or track from their local library, enable or disable the alarm, and the system reliably triggers playback at the scheduled moment. Include contextual help that explains each control.
archival audio recordings metadata database local-first sovereign personal collection manager live music archive
user wants to discover and compare software demos from a curated collection, needs detail cards with product info and developer profiles, wants category browsing and comparison capabilities

build a lightweight command-line tool that indexes files on external drives, USB sticks, DVDs, and other removable media into a local catalog file, allowing users to search for files across all indexed media without the media being connected
Define a dropdown field where each record stores its selected option but the options list is managed separately at the template/background level and can be edited by admins

Employee records (id, name, pay rate, pay type, filing status, deductions/benefits); pay period details (start date, end date, pay frequency); hours worked (if hourly) or salary adjustments; tax withholding configuration (federal, state, optional local); other deductions (401k, health insurance, garnishments)

I need a bounded carousel navigator component that allows users to horizontally navigate through a limited collection of items using a direct manipulation slider/scrollbar. The component should: 1) Maintain current index position in an ordered collection (bounded, known count), 2) Provide a horizontal slider/thumb control that users can drag to jump to any position, 3) Support step-based navigation (next/previous) via controls, 4) Display the current item in a viewport, 5) Handle boundary conditions (disable prev at first item, disable next at last item). This is a standalone local-first component, not a full carousel library.
player_handle, game_id, score_value, category_id, evidence_metadata, timestamp

Create a personal vehicle maintenance log module. It should allow adding, editing, and deleting service records. Each record includes: date, odometer reading, service type (oil change, tire rotation, brake service, fluid replacement, inspection, repair, etc.), work performed description, parts used (with quantities), cost (parts, labor, tax), and general notes. Include ability to sort by date or mileage, search notes or work performed, view total spend over time, and export to CSV. Local-first - data stored in local SQLite database, no cloud sync required.

Build a fuzzy record matcher as a single-purpose local-first utility. Input: a query string (one or two names/terms) + a delimited text file (CSV/TSV) containing large datasets. Processing: scan each record using typo-tolerant string matching that detects transposed letters, wrong characters, and common misspellings. Output: ranked list of matching records with similarity scores above a configurable threshold. The utility should handle the specific case of finding 'Salztbreg' when 'Salztberg' exists in the data, or 'humidifer' when 'humidifier' is the correct term.

I want to organize my personal craft and DIY projects in a visual catalog where I can save project photos, list materials needed, write step-by-step instructions, and browse everything in a gallery view.

User has a physical music collection (LPs, CDs, cassettes) they want to catalog and browse. They need to add items manually or via lookup, organize by format type, and quickly find and review entries.

I want a minimal personal media collection manager that runs entirely on my device—no cloud account required. It should let me add CDs (and eventually other media) by barcode or manual entry, store basic metadata (title, artist, year, genre, condition, notes), and let me search, filter, and sort my collection. I need a clean list view with key fields visible, a detail view for full metadata, and the ability to export my collection to a portable format. Keep it simple, fast, and focused on personal use.
Catalog my physical media collection (vinyl records, CDs, DVDs, Blu-rays, cassettes) with searchable metadata and flexible sorting
local SQLite database-backed order entry form with customer info, line items, and basic validation
catalog a personal movie collection with metadata fetching from public databases
extension name, extension type (command/function/library), target host application, output format, source protection level, optimization settings

Create a bounded, local-first personal research archive catalog module. It lets users manually enter or import metadata about saved articles and clippings: title, source/publication, date, category, tags, notes, and optional file attachment path. Provide a browse view with filtering by tags, categories, and date. Include a search interface for full-text and field-specific queries. Keep all data on-device, no cloud sync. Use minimal dependencies.

Implement a note sequence manager that allows users to manually reorder notes via drag-drop in a list view, batch rename selected notes using pattern replacement, delete selected notes with confirmation, and import/merge external markdown files into the current collection. All operations are local-first and persisted to the vault.

I need to catalog my personal book collection of approximately 500-2000 volumes, track where I bought each book and what I paid, search by author/title/ISBN/keyword, and export formatted bibliographies or printable catalogs

A performer needs to manage a personal song library and assemble draggable set lists for gigs. They want to create song entries with metadata (title, key, genre, tempo, duration, lyrics), build multiple set lists by selecting from the catalog, reorder songs via drag-and-drop on a numbered grid, save set list snapshots, and reactivate saved lists that stay linked to the catalog for updates.
Browse the WWDC 1990 session catalog to understand what technical presentations were available
File path to container/archive

Build a minimalist quote library app for writers that lets them save quotations with author and source attribution, organize by topics/categories, search their collection, and copy quotes to clipboard for pasting into documents. The app should be local-first and lightweight.

We need a utility pack that can read file contents into fields, write field data to files, copy/paste between file and clipboard, find and replace text in fields, sort records by multiple keys, present modal dialogs for operator input, list selection dialogs, handle picture assets, and query system folders and permissions.
local archive import
user provides: item metadata (title, artist/author, format, category, acquisition date, condition, location)

Create a floating navigation component for an admin interface that allows users to switch between grouped sections (like tabs) and navigate through paginated records within each group. The component should display current section context, include First/Prev/Next/Last buttons, and persist across view changes.

I need to transfer record data from one module to another. Help me set up a field mapping between [SOURCE_MODULE] and [TARGET_MODULE], where I can: (1) select which source module and records to transfer from, (2) select the target module to receive the data, (3) map source fields to target fields, (4) choose transfer mode (append new records, update existing, or replace all), (5) preview the data before transferring, (6) execute the transfer, and (7) review a transfer log with results. The module should support batch transfers and allow me to save mapping templates for recurring transfers.
file path or stdin of delimited records, delimiter char, sort keys config (field:sortOrder:type), output path
personal plain text archive reader with full-text search

A modeless workspace panel component for a no-code app builder. Includes: (1) asset browser with thumbnail previews for imported media (PICT, images), (2) object tree listing all UI objects at card/bg level, (3) property inspector for viewing/editing selected object attributes, (4) link/action builder for creating dynamic connections between objects with a popup menu of available actions, (5) diagnostics panel showing object IDs, color info, and add-color database details, (6) alignment and nudge tools for point-by-point adjustment. The panel should remain open alongside the main canvas and not force the user into a separate fullscreen mode or modal dialog.
a minimal classroom tool where students add their book reviews to a shared collection and others browse or search by title, author, or genre

build a bounded Qt widget library providing arbitrary-shaped clickable regions using QPainterPath for hit-testing, movable floating palette elements, and extensible custom control primitives for visual authoring tools
Personal quote database app offline searchable by author subject tag export print
personal health expense tracker local-first privacy-conscious

Build a sound cue studio module where users can create short melodies or sound effects using waveform editing, adjust parameters like tempo and volume, preview playback in real-time, organize saved cues in a local clip library, and export individual cues to standard audio formats. Include a set of starter sound effect examples.
local-first removable media catalog software
/[MODULES]/personal-library-catalog - Track owned physical books offline, private, no cloud required

Create a bounded module that takes text content from record fields, reflows the text to fit standard page widths (A4/Letter), and outputs to printer or PDF. The module should handle pagination for long content, maintain readable typography, and allow margin configuration. It should NOT attempt to replicate the on-screen visual layout but instead optimize for print readability.

Build a bounded module for saving and restoring form checkbox and radio button selections keyed by entity/record ID. It should capture selection state when user navigates away from a form, store it locally with the current record/entity as a key, and restore the exact selections when the user returns to that entity. Include methods for save(recordId), restore(recordId), clear(recordId), and hasState(recordId). The storage layer should use localStorage or IndexedDB for persistence across page loads.
A personal tool for collecting short text snippets—quotes, passages, lines—into a searchable library with the ability to instantly surface one at random.

Build a local-first construction expense tracker for homeowners managing residential renovation or building projects. Core features: record individual payments with date, amount, vendor, description, and category; set budget targets per category (up to 26 customizable categories); view side-by-side budget vs actual per category with variance indicators; generate category-sumary report exportable for tax purposes. Data persists locally. No cloud sync required. Minimalist UI focused on quick entry and clear comparison.
a local-first minuet generator where users roll virtual dice to select predefined measures from a phrase library, assembling them into a valid classical minuet sequence
user wants to catalog growing personal media collection (music CDs, books, movies, games, collectibles) with instant search and sort by creator/title/category

You are designing a local-first personal media catalog module. The user needs to add physical media items (books, VHS tapes, DVDs, CDs, records, games) with customizable fields, sort/filter by identifier or title, and generate printable lists or exportable reports. What UI components, data structures, and core workflows are needed?

As a user with a folder containing many text files, I want to merge all (or selected) .txt files from that folder into a single consolidated text file, so that I can review, process, or archive the combined content.
a locked local file or document package (e.g., password-protected PDF, Office document, ZIP archive, encrypted archive)
pattern_library
a JavaScript/TypeScript micro-library for global key-value state management with bulk updates and scoped context overrides, local-first, zero dependencies, ~150 LOC
A local CLI tool or Python library to send structured commands between desktop applications on a single machine, with adapters for common targets like file managers and data apps

I need a React module that lets users select multiple records from a table, navigate through just those selected records one at a time, and run batch actions like delete or status-change on all selected items at once.

I have boxes of USB drives, external hard drives, CDs, and DVDs with archived files. I need to catalog what's on each piece of media while it's connected, then later search that catalog to find specific files without having to connect every device.
The user wants to create a taxonomic record with custom fields, or search existing records, or calculate biodiversity metrics from the database.

Create a bounded module for triggering safe system shutdown/restart from within an operations console application. The module must include: (1) a user-facing action selector with confirmation step to prevent accidental shutdown, (2) a privileged helper invocation layer using XPC/SMJobBless for executing the shutdown/restart system calls in the correct order, (3) an audit logging interface that writes structured event records to os_log with action type, timestamp, principal, and outcome. Focus on macOS privileged helper patterns and secure authorization flow.

Developer needs quick reusable utility functions for common programming tasks in their project or IDE extension. They want file I/O helpers, dialog creators, clipboard managers, image processors, and data manipulation tools that can be imported as a library.
local-first contact manager with customizable fields and sorting
Case folder or document collection for litigation matter

Build a minimal local-first SQLite database compaction tool that selects a .db file, calculates potential space savings, runs the VACUUM command, and reports results. Focus on CLI experience with a single-purpose bounded scope.
content advisory movie database with filters and custom entries
Select and add small bundled sound-effect library to [PROJECT] for UI interaction cues without original audio production
User wants to add a new stock holding, record quarterly dividend received, view YTD performance, and export tax report
User needs to edit a single formatted document file (RTF/MD/ODT) located anywhere on their local filesystem, with full style preservation and quick access without cloud or database dependency.
local flat-file catalog import and searchable metadata browser, single-user, offline-first, sovereign module
Floating inspector panel component library with local-first state management, drag positioning, focus trapping, and escape-to-close behavior.
Grateful Dead show archive with searchable concert records

You are designing a lightweight browser-based music composition tool that lets users quickly create simple melodies and beats using point-and-click note entry, assign custom samples or instruments to tracks, save compositions locally, and export/import song data. The tool should be a focused sketchpad, not a full DAW. Include: 1) A piano-roll or step-grid note entry surface for composing melodies and rhythms. 2) Transport controls (play, pause, stop, loop) for previewing compositions. 3) An instrument/sample picker that allows users to assign different sounds to different tracks or steps. 4) A local composition library for saving and retrieving saved works. 5) Import/export functionality for exchanging composition files with other users or tools.

Write a bounded module that provides serial device communication capabilities: connect to a serial port (USB-Serial, RS-232), open a terminal-style interface for interactive command exchange, send and receive data frames, include example protocol command handlers (status query, configuration read/write, data polling), manage connection state, and provide example integrations for common serial devices. The module should be usable as a local developer tool or embedded library, not a full terminal emulator suite.
Generate a static link directory from a curated collection of resources organized by category taxonomy using page templates.

You are building a bounded Python module for idle-state management on shared/public terminals. The module must: 1) Detect system idle time across Windows/macOS/Linux using platform-specific APIs, 2) Accept configurable idle thresholds (e.g., 5min, 15min), 3) Trigger screensaver, display sleep, or kiosk lock when threshold exceeded, 4) Detect user activity and restore normal state, 5) Run as a local service suitable for kiosk, library, or public terminal deployments. Write only the module code with clear submodule boundaries, no broad UI or cloud features.
vehicle make, model, year, VIN, license plate, current odometer
What target record or page should this link connect to?
Personal card collector wants to catalog their collection offline with condition grading and value tracking

>>> SOURCE_APPLICATION: [name] >>> TARGET_APPLICATION: [name] >>> DESIRED_DATA_TYPE: [e.g., spreadsheet, vector graphic, database] >>> CONSTRAINTS: [e.g., must preserve formatting, batch processing, no external service]

Create a local-first audio asset utility that imports sound files from any source, converts between common audio formats, exports to development project folders or standalone files, maintains an organized searchable library, and supports basic metadata tagging for quick retrieval.

I want to catalog my personal music collection. I need to store: album title, artist name, track list (text), and personal notes (e.g., where I got it, mood, rating). I want to view my collection sorted by artist or title, and search across all fields. I want this to run locally on my machine—no cloud, no internet required.

Local sunrise/sunset calculator that computes exact sunrise, sunset, solar noon, and total daylight duration for any user-selected date and saved location, with full CRUD for a personal location database.
searchable quote database with tags author subject and user-added entries
Couple names, event date, contact records (guests and vendors)

I need to extract member profile data from [DIRECTORY_URL] or [UPLOADED_FILE]. The fields I care about are: [FIELD_LIST]. Normalize the data into structured records with standard formats for [ATTRIBUTE_TYPES]. Then apply these segmentation rules: [FILTER_CRITERIA]. Finally, export as [PREFERRED_FORMAT] for use with [TARGET_TOOL].
A developer or small team who has created software (application, library, tool) and needs to understand and complete copyright registration with the US Copyright Office.
Personal music collection catalog for vinyl, CD, and cassette
